About Me

Building infrastructure that scales.

I am a Senior Analyst (DevOps) at Capgemini, Bangalore, with 4 years of hands-on experience building cloud-native infrastructure and delivery pipelines that actually scale.

My work sits at the intersection of cloud architecture, container orchestration, and developer experience — from designing enterprise Internal Developer Platforms on AWS EKS to automating multi-environment CI/CD workflows with zero manual intervention.

I am deeply invested in observability, GitOps, and Infrastructure-as-Code, and I care about building systems that are reliable, cost-efficient, and a joy for engineering teams to work with.

Bangalore, India

My Journey

A track record of delivering impactful DevOps solutions across enterprise projects at Capgemini.

C
Capgemini
Bangalore, India  ·  3 yrs 9 mos · Full-time
Senior Analyst
Oct 2025 – Present · 9 mos · Hybrid
Enterprise Developer Portal — DevOps Implementation
  • Designed enterprise-scale IDP using Backstage on AWS EKS, orchestrating CI/CD for 100+ microservices.
  • Deployed Backstage with StatefulSets, PostgreSQL, ingress controllers and RBAC on EKS.
  • Integrated AWS (EKS, ECR, S3) with Azure DevOps; configured secrets management and deployment workflows.
  • Configured 10+ software templates enabling bulk deployment of 100+ apps via Azure DevOps API.
  • Integrated ArgoCD GitOps with real-time webhook automation and automated sync monitoring.
  • Set up Grafana/Prometheus; implemented Kubernetes Secrets for multi-environment credentials.

Analyst
Oct 2022 – Oct 2025 · 3 yrs 1 mo · Hybrid
GenX — Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps Automation
  • Built Jenkins CI/CD pipelines for multi-env deployments, reducing deployment effort by 30%.
  • Automated AWS infra provisioning using Terraform (VPC, EC2, IAM, EKS, ALB, Auto Scaling).
  • Orchestrated EKS clusters with Ingress, HPA & rolling updates; ArgoCD GitOps — 100% consistency.
  • Containerized microservices with Docker multistage builds (30% smaller images); artifacts in ECR.
  • Deployed Prometheus/Grafana dashboards, reducing MTTD by 35%.
  • Managed AWS platform at 99.5% uptime; achieved 20% cost reduction through optimization.
